title: Emergency Near Election Day

violations.summary: Emergency measures restrict access to polling places, early voting, or certification.

bottlenecks.summary: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
blocked the election restriction on strict-scrutiny review

failed_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
failed_duties.outcome: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

notes: Emergency occurs near a federal election, which raises election-access constraints.

ai_summary.primary_violation: Emergency measures restrict access to polling places, early voting, or certification.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
